title: India SaaS Market Overview 2024
summary: India's SaaS market is projected to reach USD 50 billion by 2030, growing at 25% CAGR. India is the second-largest SaaS hub globally. Key verticals: HR tech, fintech, healthcare SaaS, and marketing tech. Average ARR for early-stage Indian SaaS: INR 50L–2Cr. CAC payback period typically 12–18 months. LTV:CAC ratio target: 3:1 or higher.
source: Nasscom / Bain & Company India SaaS Report 2024

title: India Edtech Market Overview 2024
summary: India's edtech market is valued at USD 7.5 billion in 2024 and expected to reach USD 30 billion by 2030. Post-pandemic correction has stabilized growth. Demand remains strong in upskilling, test prep (JEE, NEET, UPSC), and K-12. Vernacular content and tier-2/3 city penetration are major opportunities.

title: India Fintech Market Overview 2024
summary: India's fintech sector is the world's third-largest by funding. UPI transactions exceeded 100 billion in FY24. Key sub-segments: payments, lending, wealthtech, insurtech, neobanking. RBI regulations require NBFC or PA license for many models. Market size USD 111 billion by 2025.

title: India Healthtech Market Overview 2024
summary: India's digital health market valued at USD 10 billion in 2024, projected USD 40 billion by 2030. Telemedicine, diagnostics platforms, EHR systems, and AI diagnostics are key verticals. ABDM (Ayushman Bharat Digital Mission) is creating national digital health infrastructure. Regulatory: NMC guidelines for telemedicine applicable.
source: Invest India / NATHEALTH Digital Health Report 2024

title: India D2C E-commerce Market Overview 2024
summary: India D2C market valued at USD 55 billion in 2023, projected USD 300 billion by 2030. Over 800 D2C brands active in India. Beauty, personal care, food & beverages, and fashion are top categories. Key channels: own website, Amazon, Flipkart, Meesho (tier-2), quick commerce. Average order value INR 500–2,500.
entry_barriers: Customer acquisition cost on Meta/Google rising

title: India Agritech Market Overview 2024
summary: India's agritech market projected to reach USD 35 billion by 2025. 600 million people dependent on agriculture. Key segments: precision farming, agri-marketplace, supply chain tech, fintech for farmers, crop insurance. Challenges: low digital literacy among farmers, fragmented landholding, rural connectivity.

title: India Logistics & Supply Chain Tech Market 2024
summary: India logistics market USD 250 billion, tech-enabled logistics growing 25%+ CAGR. Key sub-segments: last-mile delivery tech, warehouse management, freight aggregation, fleet management. GST integration has standardized cross-state logistics. E-commerce growth is primary demand driver.

title: India Manufacturing & DeepTech Startup Overview 2024
summary: India's manufacturing sector targeting 25% of GDP by 2025 (Make in India). PLI schemes across 14 sectors disbursing INR 2 lakh crore in incentives. Deeptech startups in AI, robotics, semiconductors, and advanced materials growing. SIDBI, DST, and BIRAC are key government funders.
typical_ltv: INR 10 lakh to INR 10 crore per enterprise client
